content.intro: The compliance pack bundles all legally required move-in documents into a single send. PropertyGoose assembles the correct documents automatically based on the tenancy type and start date.

sections.title: How to Send the Compliance Pack

steps.title: Open the Tenancy
steps.content: Navigate to the Tenancies tab and open the tenancy you want to send documents for.

steps.title: Click Send Compliance Pack
steps.content: Click 'Send Compliance Pack' or 'Move-In Pack' (the button label may vary). This opens the document selection screen.

steps.title: Select Documents to Include
steps.content: Choose which documents to include in the pack. Options typically include: the tenancy agreement, EPC (Energy Performance Certificate), Gas Safety Certificate, the government's How to Rent guide, and the deposit protection certificate.

steps.title: Pre-May 2026 Tenancies — Compliance Pack Information Sheet
steps.content: For tenancies with a start date before 1 May 2026, the compliance pack information sheet covers the conversion from AST to Assured Periodic Tenancy as required by the Renters Rights Act.

steps.title: Click Send
steps.content: Click Send to dispatch the compliance pack. The tenant receives all selected documents by email in a single, clearly organised message.

sections.title: Compliance Pack Deadline — 30 May 2026
sections.content: For all legacy AST tenants (tenancies that started before 1 May 2026), the compliance pack must be served before 30 May 2026. This is a legal requirement under the Renters Rights Act. Failure to serve it by this date may affect your ability to take possession proceedings.
